name: skill_view
description: Load and view the full content of a skill (SKILL.md file). Returns parsed JSON with metadata and body.

skill_name.description: Name of the skill to load (alphanumeric, dash, underscore, dot only)

mode.description: What to return: 'summary' (metadata+body), 'manifest' (metadata only), or 'body' (body only)

max_chars.description: Maximum characters to return in body (for 'summary' and 'body' modes)
